docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,236.80 FILED BY SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA FEDERAL SAVINGS & LOAN ASSN. AS TO DEFENDANT KING,SHAPIRO,MITTELMAN&BUCHMAN,A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA FEDERAL SAVINGS & LOAN ASSN. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING,SHAPIRO,MITTELMAN&BUCHMAN,A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION $1,236.80 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,251.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KING,SHAPIRO,MITTELMAN&BUCHMAN,A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR APR-22-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-22-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KING,SHAPIRO,MITTELMAN&BUCHMAN,A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
